items.title: Building Neobrutalist UIs
items.description: Presented at WebConf 2025. A deep dive into the philosophy and implementation of neobrutalist design patterns.

items.title: The Future of AI in Web Development
items.description: Keynote at DevSummit 2024. Exploring how AI agents are transforming the way we build and deploy web applications.

items.title: Mastering TypeScript
items.description: Workshop at JSConf 2023. Practical tips and tricks for writing type-safe, maintainable code.

# Conference Talks

A collection of presentations I've given at various conferences and meetups.
